recommendations.title: The Grapes of Death
recommendations.overview: A young woman discovers that the pesticide being sprayed on vineyards is turning people into murderous lunatics.

recommendations.title: The Boy Behind the Door
recommendations.overview: Bobby tries to save himself and his best friend when they are kidnapped on their way home from school.

recommendations.title: Sabrina
recommendations.overview: A toy manufacturer and his wife are terrorized by a demon after their orphaned niece tries to call her late mother's spirit.

recommendations.title: Shortcut
recommendations.overview: A group of five classmates is trapped inside their school bus after an encounter with a mysterious creature on the road. Amid constant threats from the creature, the teen's anxiety increases while their survival chances decrease.

recommendations.title: Sissy
recommendations.overview: Cecilia is a successful social media influencer living the dream, until she runs into her ex-childhood best friend and is invited away on her bachelorette weekend. Suddenly, Sissy finds herself stuck in a remote cabin with her school bully... and a t

recommendations.title: Piggy
recommendations.overview: A bullied overweight teenager sees a glimpse of hope when her tormentors are brutally abducted by a mesmerizing stranger.

recommendations.title: Drive Thru
recommendations.overview: A high-school student must save townspeople from a murderous clown who works at a fast-food place.

recommendations.title: Bang Bang You're Dead
recommendations.overview: A troubled and bullied high school student fights against judgement from his community after threatening to bomb the football team.

recommendations.title: Motherless Brooklyn
recommendations.overview: New York City, 1957. Lionel Essrog, a private detective living with Tourette syndrome, tries to solve the murder of his mentor and best friend, armed only with vague clues and the strength of his obsessive mind.
